etymology.notes: tuh tuh cf. Lane 319: a cry by which one chides the

Preterit.turoyo: aḥna kulan mtahtáhle-lan b-i=briṯo naḥət w mlele qum ṣadre kefe w rahəṭ lak kalbe (...) mtahtahle ak kalbe
translations:
uns
			hat er alle in alle Welt auseinandergetrieben

He went down and gathered some stones in front of his chest and
			ran towards the dogs. He dispersed the dogs.
